svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.3.4" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="wms-architecture" name="WMS Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="3565" dy="1943" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1900" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a1a2e;" value="Waste Management System — Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="550" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-client-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;opacity=30;fontSize=12;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="980" width="340" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-client-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#23527c;" value="CLIENT (Browser / PWA)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="340" x="40" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-backend-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="980" width="360" x="430" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-backend-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#33691e;" value="BACKEND (Google Apps Script)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="360" x="430" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-storage-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="980" width="360" x="840" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-storage-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7d6608;" value="GOOGLE WORKSPACE (Storage)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="360" x="840" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-notif-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="980" width="280" x="1250" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-notif-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#a52a2a;" value="NOTIFICATIONS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="280" x="1250" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-login" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="🔐 Login Section
(index.html)

• Enter email
• Google Sign-In button
• Status messages" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="60" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-session" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="🔑 Session Manager
(script.js)

• localStorage: token, role, email, tokenExpiry
• Token refresh timer (30 min before expiry)
• validateSession() on every load
• handleSessionExpired() → clear & redirect" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="300" x="60" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-select" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📦 Package & Waste Type Selection

• P4 / P5 / P6 card selection
• Hazardous ☣️ / Solid 🗑️ toggle
• Breadcrumb navigation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="60" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-form" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📝 Waste Log Form

Hazardous: date, volume (L), waste name, photo
Solid: date, dump location, waste name, photo

• Canvas watermark on photo (email + pkg + time)
• Fingerprint dedup check before POST
• Submit → POST to Apps Script" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="300" x="60" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-history" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📋 History & Export

• Date range filter (from / to)
• Fetch records from Apps Script
• Render table with photo preview modal
• Export to Excel (.xlsx) via SheetJS
• Export to PDF via jsPDF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="300" x="60" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-admin" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="🛡️ Admin Dashboard (Admin+ only)

• User Management: approve / reject / role / delete
• Analytics: KPIs, trend chart, breakdown,
 contributors, PDF export
• Request Logs
• Push notification bell + badge" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="300" x="60" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-sw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0e6ff;strokeColor=#7b4f9e;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="⚙️ Service Worker (sw.js)

• Receives push events
• Shows system notifications
• Handles notification click actions
• Background sync hook" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="60" y="980" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b-router" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="🔀 Request Router
(doGet / doPost)

Dispatches by action= parameter:
• No action + email → login
• validateToken / refreshToken / logout
• getUsers / approveUser / rejectUser
• updateUserStatus / updateUserRole / deleteUser
• getRequests / checkUserSheet
• getImageBase64
• package= → fetch records
• POST body → log waste entry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="320" x="450" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b-auth" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="🔐 Auth Module

checkUser(email)
 → lookup or register user
 → issue UUID token + 7-day expiry

validateUserToken(token)
 → match token, check expiry

refreshToken(oldToken)
 → extend expiry 7 more days

requireAdmin(token)
 → role must be admin/super_admin" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="320" x="450" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b-ratelimit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="⏱️ Rate Limiter

checkRateLimit(email)
 → RateLimits sheet lookup
 → 100 req / hour per user
 → reset after 1-hour window
 → returns true/false" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="320" x="450" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b-usermgr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="👥 User Manager (Admin+)

getUsersSecure(token)
updateUserStatusSecure(token, email, status)
updateUserRoleSecure(token, email, role)
deleteUserSecure(token, email)

Super Admin only: role changes, deletes
Admin: approve/reject pending only" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="320" x="450" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b-data" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📊 Data Layer

fetchEntries(pkg, user, from, to, wasteType)
 → selects PACKAGE_MAP or SOLID_PACKAGE_MAP
 → opens correct sheet
 → filters by package + date range
 → returns [headers, ...rows]

doPost → validates fields → uploads photo
 → appends row with timestamp" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="320" x="450" y="880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s-users" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📄 Google Sheet: Users
(USER_SHEET_ID)

Cols: Email | Status | Token |
Last Login | Role | Token Expiry

Status: Pending / Approved / Rejected
Role: user / admin / super_admin" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="300" x="860" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s-ratelimit" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📄 Google Sheet: RateLimits

Cols: Email | Count | Window Start

Resets per 1-hour sliding window
Max: 100 requests / hour" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="300" x="860" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s-requests" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📄 Google Sheet: Requests
(Idempotency Log)

Cols: requestId | timestamp

Prevents duplicate POST submissions
requestId = fingerprint + date" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="300" x="860" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s-accesslog" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📄 Google Sheet: Access_Log
(Audit Trail)

Cols: Timestamp | Action | Email |
Success | IP

Every API call is logged here" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="300" x="860" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s-hazsheets" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📄 Google Sheets: Hazardous Waste
(PACKAGE_MAP)

P4: separate sheet + Drive folder
P5: separate sheet + Drive folder
P6: separate sheet + Drive folder

Cols: date | volume | waste name |
package | logged by | photo | timestamp" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="300" x="860" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s-solidsheets" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📄 Google Sheets: Solid Waste
(SOLID_PACKAGE_MAP)

P4: separate sheet + Drive folder
P5: separate sheet + Drive folder
P6: separate sheet + Drive folder

Cols: date | location | waste name |
package | logged by | photo | timestamp" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="300" x="860" y="910" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n-gmail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📧 Gmail / MailApp

sendStatusNotification()
 → Approval email to user
 → Rejection email to user

notifySuperAdminsOfNewUser()
 → Alert all super_admins
 on new registration" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="240" x="1270" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n-push" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="🔔 Push Notifications
(Browser / Service Worker)

• Admin enables permission
• Poll every 2 min for pending users
• count increased → showNotification()
• Actions: [Review Now] [Later]
• Click → navigate to User Mgmt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="240" x="1270" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n-drive" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📁 Google Drive
(Photo Storage)

Per-package folders:
• Hazardous P4 / P5 / P6
• Solid P4 / P5 / P6

Files: JPEG with canvas watermark
Access: via getImageBase64()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="240" x="1270" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n-libs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6d0de;strokeColor=#ae4132;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="📦 External Libraries (CDN)

• Chart.js — analytics charts
• jsPDF — PDF export
• SheetJS (xlsx) — Excel export
• Canvas API (built-in) — watermark" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="240" x="1270" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="c-login" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#23527c;fontSize=10;" target="b-router" value="GET ?email="> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="c-session" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#23527c;fontSize=10;" target="b-router" value="GET ?action=validateToken
refreshToken / logout"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="c-form" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#23527c;fontSize=10;" target="b-router" value="POST {token, package,
wasteType, fields, imageByte}"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="c-history" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#23527c;fontSize=10;" target="b-router" value="GET ?package=&wasteType=
&from=&to="> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="c-admin" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" target="b-router" value="GET ?action=getUsers
approveUser / deleteUser etc."> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="b-auth" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="b-ratelimit" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="b-usermgr" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="b-data" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-auth" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#7d6608;fontSize=10;" target="s-users" value="R/W token, status, role"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-ratelimit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#7d6608;fontSize=10;" target="s-ratelimit" value="R/W counts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#7d6608;fontSize=10;" target="s-requests" value="Check / log requestId"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#7d6608;fontSize=10;" target="s-accesslog" value="logRequest() every call"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#7d4f00;fontSize=10;" target="s-hazsheets" value="R/W waste rows"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e15" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#7d4f00;fontSize=10;" target="s-solidsheets" value="R/W waste rows"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e16" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#7d4f00;fontSize=10;" target="n-drive" value="createFile(blob)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e17" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-usermgr" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#a52a2a;fontSize=10;" target="n-gmail" value="MailApp.sendEmail()"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e18" edge="1" parent="1" source="b-auth" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#a52a2a;fontSize=10;" target="n-gmail" value="notifySuperAdmins()"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e19" edge="1" parent="1" source="c-admin" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#a52a2a;fontSize=10;" target="n-push" value="Poll + SW.showNotification()"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e20" edge="1" parent="1" source="c-sw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#6b3d8c;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="c-admin" value="postMessage(NAVIGATE_TO_ADMIN)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e21" edge="1" parent="1" source="c-admin" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#ae4132;fontColor=#ae4132;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="n-libs" value="Chart.js / jsPDF / SheetJS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> div.div:
🔐 Login Section
(index.html)
• Enter email
• Google Sign-In button
• Status messages

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 245px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
🔑 Session Manager
(script.js)
• localStorage: token, role, email, tokenExpiry
• Token refresh timer (30 min before expiry)
• validateSession() on every load
• handleSessionExpired() → clear & redirect

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 395px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
📦 Package & Waste Type Selection
• P4 / P5 / P6 card selection
• Hazardous ☣️ / Solid 🗑️ toggle
• Breadcrumb navigation

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 525px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
📝 Waste Log Form
Hazardous: date, volume (L), waste name, photo
Solid: date, dump location, waste name, photo
• Canvas watermark on photo (email + pkg + time)
• Fingerprint dedup check before POST
• Submit → POST to Apps Script

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 675px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
📋 History & Export
• Date range filter (from / to)
• Fetch records from Apps Script
• Render table with photo preview modal
• Export to Excel (.xlsx) via SheetJS
• Export to PDF via jsPDF

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 825px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
🛡️ Admin Dashboard (Admin+ only)
• User Management: approve / reject / role / delete
• Analytics: KPIs, trend chart, breakdown,
contributors, PDF export
• Request Logs
• Push notification bell + badge

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 230, 255), rgb(41, 33, 54)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(123, 79, 158), rgb(181, 143, 211));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 975px; margin-left: 32px;

div.div:
⚙️ Service Worker (sw.js)
• Receives push events
• Shows system notifications
• Handles notification click actions
• Background sync hook

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 422px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
🔀 Request Router
(doGet / doPost)
Dispatches by action= parameter:
• No action + email → login
• validateToken / refreshToken / logout
• getUsers / approveUser / rejectUser
• updateUserStatus / updateUserRole / deleteUser
• getRequests / checkUserSheet
• getImageBase64
• package= → fetch records
• POST body → log waste entry

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 345px; margin-left: 422px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
🔐 Auth Module
checkUser(email)
→ lookup or register user
→ issue UUID token + 7-day expiry
validateUserToken(token)
→ match token, check expiry
refreshToken(oldToken)
→ extend expiry 7 more days
requireAdmin(token)
→ role must be admin/super_admin

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 555px; margin-left: 422px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⏱️ Rate Limiter
checkRateLimit(email)
→ RateLimits sheet lookup
→ 100 req / hour per user
→ reset after 1-hour window
→ returns true/false

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 705px; margin-left: 422px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
👥 User Manager (Admin+)
getUsersSecure(token)
updateUserStatusSecure(token, email, status)
updateUserRoleSecure(token, email, role)
deleteUserSecure(token, email)
Super Admin only: role changes, deletes
Admin: approve/reject pending only

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 875px; margin-left: 422px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
📊 Data Layer
fetchEntries(pkg, user, from, to, wasteType)
→ selects PACKAGE_MAP or SOLID_PACKAGE_MAP
→ opens correct sheet
→ filters by package + date range
→ returns [headers, ...rows]
doPost → validates fields → uploads photo
→ appends row with timestamp

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 290px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 830px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
📄 Google Sheet: Users
(USER_SHEET_ID)
Cols: Email | Status | Token |
Last Login | Role | Token Expiry
Status: Pending / Approved / Rejected
Role: user / admin / super_admin

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.div:
📄 Google Sheet: RateLimits
Cols: Email | Count | Window Start
Resets per 1-hour sliding window
Max: 100 requests / hour

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 290px; height: 1px; padding-top: 415px; margin-left: 830px;

div.div:
📄 Google Sheet: Requests
(Idempotency Log)
Cols: requestId | timestamp
Prevents duplicate POST submissions
requestId = fingerprint + date

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 290px; height: 1px; padding-top: 565px; margin-left: 830px;

div.div:
📄 Google Sheet: Access_Log
(Audit Trail)
Cols: Timestamp | Action | Email |
Success | IP
Every API call is logged here

div.div:
📄 Google Sheets: Hazardous Waste
(PACKAGE_MAP)
P4: separate sheet + Drive folder
P5: separate sheet + Drive folder
P6: separate sheet + Drive folder
Cols: date | volume | waste name |
package | logged by | photo | timestamp

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.div:
📄 Google Sheets: Solid Waste
(SOLID_PACKAGE_MAP)
P4: separate sheet + Drive folder
P5: separate sheet + Drive folder
P6: separate sheet + Drive folder
Cols: date | location | waste name |
package | logged by | photo | timestamp

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 1240px;

div.div:
📧 Gmail / MailApp
sendStatusNotification()
→ Approval email to user
→ Rejection email to user
notifySuperAdminsOfNewUser()
→ Alert all super_admins
on new registration

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 315px; margin-left: 1240px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
🔔 Push Notifications
(Browser / Service Worker)
• Admin enables permission
• Poll every 2 min for pending users
• count increased → showNotification()
• Actions: [Review Now] [Later]
• Click → navigate to User Mgmt

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 515px; margin-left: 1240px;

div.div:
📁 Google Drive
(Photo Storage)
Per-package folders:
• Hazardous P4 / P5 / P6
• Solid P4 / P5 / P6
Files: JPEG with canvas watermark
Access: via getImageBase64()

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(230, 208, 222), rgb(67, 48, 60)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(174, 65, 50), rgb(236, 143, 130));

div.div:
📦 External Libraries (CDN)
• Chart.js — analytics charts
• jsPDF — PDF export
• SheetJS (xlsx) — Excel export
• Canvas API (built-in) — watermark
